title: Explaining Unit 01s awakening in Eva 20
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Explaining Unit-01's awakening in Eva 2.0             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Wed May 01, 2013 9:03 am In the climax of Rebuild 2.0, Unit-01 battles the 10th Angel ("Zeruel") until it runs out of power. However, Shinji's eyes suddenly start glowing red as he shouts: "GIVE BACK Ayanami!" And Unit-01 reactivates with seemingly limitless power, regrows its severed arm out of light, sprouts a halo and goes to town on the Angel. In fact, the Chamber of Guf (black circle in the sky) opens while the 10th Angel is still alive. I have a rather simple theory about why this happens at exactly that time. I believe the key is Shinji's command of "GIVE BACK Ayanami!" It is directed at the Angel (which had recently devoured Unit-00 and Rei along with it), but Rebuild 3.0 has now revealed to us that Ayanami is also Yui's name . Without knowing it, Shinji called out to his mother to come back to him, and she heeded his call by gaining full consciousness. Therefore, it is not so much Shinji fueling Unit-01 with sheer willpower, but rather Yui taking control of the Evangelion herself. Remember that we do not see Shinji in his plugsuit after that; he has become a white entity that has now become completely unaware of the Evangelion's physical surroundings. All he can see is the Angel's AT Field and Rei somewhere beyond. That is because Yui is now piloting the Evangelion consciously, and Shinji has been sucked into the core, being relegated to a part of Unit-01's subconscious. I could go even further and say that the Near-Third Impact that starts afterwards is consciously initiated by Yui, and probably exactly what Gendo was hoping/expecting she would do. In fact, it can be surmised that Gendo recruited Shinji as a pilot for the singular purpose of awakening Yui, just like in the NGE series. One last little clue that may support this theory is the picture seen of Yui entering Unit-01's core in her direct entry rig. She is seen wearing a suit that looks very much like mechanical white feathered angel wings, but she is also sprouting a halo that is not clearly mechanical, or even attached to the rest of the rig. Although halos are also seen elsewhere (typically over Angels), Unit-01 sprouting a halo before it devoured the 10th Angel, could be a visual clue linking it with the image of Yui's direct core entry. ASIDE: It would also highly suggest that Ayanami Yui herself is an Angel, specifically either the 2nd or 11th one (as all others have already been identified). This has the added benefit of explaining why Unit-01 appears to already possess god-like powers before it consumes the 10th Angel's core. - Why could Yui be the 2nd Angel? Because she was around since before the Third Angel ("Tunniel") was captured and imprisoned in NERV Bethany Base, but apparently after the first Angel (Kaworu) became a part of SEELE's conspiracy. - Why could Yui be the 11th Angel? Because Unit-01 was speared after the 10th Angel was destroyed by Unit-01, but before the 12th Angel was devoured by Unit-13 (in Rebuild 3.0).

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Wed May 01, 2013 10:29 am I always believed that everytime EVA-1 was going berserk it was actually Yui taking control so you are probably right.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Wed May 01, 2013 10:57 am Dima wrote: I always believed that everytime EVA-1 was going berserk it was actually Yui taking control so you are probably right.

[]:             Quote Post by alexsan1991x » Wed May 01, 2013 11:02 am An interesting theory, actually. I like it. However, considering Ritsuko's explanation I'd like to stand by the theory that Yui is ascending to God-Hood to grant Shinji's wish. "Give Ayanami... BACK TO ME!" "What happens to me doesn't matter. What happens to the world doesn't matter. But Ayanami... At least Ayanami... I'll deffinitely save her!" At this point, Shinji doesn't give two shits about anyone but Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Tian » Wed May 01, 2013 11:39 am I've been rewatching the movies as of late so here's my take. I agree with the idea that "awakening" is Yui reasserting her will and attaining godhood somehow. Third Impact was initiated in 2.22 without any of the prerequisites from EoE - no S2 engine devoured, no shenanigans with Adam or Lilith yet, etc. So apparently an Eva's will is enough to open the Doors of Guf. The dialogue suggests that it is in fact Rei who was meant bait Shinji into awakening Unit 01. Fuyutsuki comments that Shinji and Rei were enough to trigger the event during this scene. In 3.33 he says Rei's soul is in Eva-01 and that was part of Gendo's plan. So I'd go so far as to say Gendo sent Rei out there specifically to get eaten by the 10th Angel, making Shinji mad/desperate enough to trigger Unit 01. It seems like the pilot's mind influences the desire of the Eva, in the same way the pilot and Eva have to sync up in order to operate (only taken to an extreme).

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed May 01, 2013 12:38 pm Tian wrote: I've been rewatching the movies as of late so here's my take. I agree with the idea that "awakening" is Yui reasserting her will and attaining godhood somehow. Third Impact was initiated in 2.22 without any of the prerequisites from EoE - no S2 engine devoured, no shenanigans with Adam or Lilith yet, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Psychodrake » Wed May 01, 2013 12:49 pm Don't forget that Rei is a fragment of Yui's soul, so taking Rei into herself may have "Completed" Yui's soul somewhat.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed May 01, 2013 1:08 pm Psychodrake wrote: Don't forget that Rei is a fragment of Yui's soul, so taking Rei into herself may have "Completed" Yui's soul somewhat.

[]:             Quote Post by Tian » Wed May 01, 2013 1:18 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: Actually, Eva-01 appears to absorb Eva-00's core from Zeruel, and possibly takes the Fruit of Life (S2 Engine) into herself as well. Plus, Rei has Lilith's soul.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed May 01, 2013 1:39 pm Tian wrote: The sequence goes: awakening -> Eva-01 curbstomps Zeruel -> Doors of Guf open (unless that's not what the swirling vortex actually is) -> Eva-01 and the Angel both levitate toward it -> Eva-01 recovers Eva-00's core, Shinji pulls Rei out of... wherever she was. So I think you're right in that Eva-01 may have obtained the S2 engine here and possibly Lilith's soul, but the Third Impact apparently kicks off just before any of that happens. Afterward we see Eva-01 becoming the energy being, spreading the wings, and in that shot it has two cores.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Wed May 01, 2013 2:18 pm The Door of Guf vortex opens the moment Eva-01 enters in contact with the Angel's core (SUBMIT TO THE POWER OF THE PALMS!!) it seemed to me that at that point both cores get connected and start to fuse as seen with the tunnel that forms through the Angels's core between Eva-01's and Eva-00's cores, what we see next is just the physical completion of the fusion.
